mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at), 'HH24:00') as hourLabel, AVG(dead_tuple_increase_rate_pm) as deadTupleIncreaseRate, AVG(dead_tuple_processing_rate_pm) as avgProgress FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) LIMIT #{buckets}

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at), 'HH24:00') as hourLabel, AVG(avg_cost_delay_ms) as avgCostDelayMs, AVG(worker_utilization_pct) as activeWorkers FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) LIMIT #{buckets}

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at), 'HH24:00') as hourLabel, AVG(avg_delay_seconds) as avgDelaySeconds FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) LIMIT #{buckets}
